title: SlimeFun Remastered
description: Slimefun turns your Spigot or Paper server into a modpack-like experience without players needing to install a single client mod. It adds over 500 new items and recipes spanning two major progression trees: Magic and Technology.
body:
Slimefun 5 is a **community-maintained continuation** of the original Slimefun4 plugin, which was discontinued by its original developers. This fork continues active development with support for modern and legacy Minecraft versions (1.8–1.21+).

Slimefun turns your Spigot or Paper server into a **modpack-like experience** without players needing to install a single client mod. It adds **over 500 new items and recipes** spanning two major progression trees: **Magic and Technology**.

![Screenshot provided by HamtaBot#0001](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f93c7752ac0cbeb9ee600433b7a8c4d9774065_0.webp)

# Feature Highlights

## Technology
- Full electric power grid, generators, capacitors, machines, and energy networks
- Automated cargo & item transport systems
- Programmable Androids that mine, farm, and build for you
- Auto Crafters for both vanilla and Slimefun recipes
- Nuclear reactors, solar generators, and more
## Magic
- Ancient Altars for magical crafting rituals
- Magical staves, talismans, and enchanted armor
- Soulbound items that persist through death
- Magical gadgets and utilities
## World & Exploration
- GEO resource scanning and mining, discover oil, salt, and more underground
- GPS network & waypoint system with personal teleporter pads
- Backpacks of various sizes to expand your inventory
- Multitool, Tape Measure, and other useful gadgets
## Quality of Life
- Full in-game guide book - browse all items, recipes, and categories
- Extensive research & progression system
- Fully translatable, 40+ community languages via Crowdin
- Rich addon ecosystem with dozens of community addons to expand functionality

# Requirements
- Papern or Spigot
- Minecraft Version 1.8.x - 1.21.x
- Java Version Java 8 or higher
# Supported Integrations
- PlaceholderAPI
- WorldEdit
- mcMMO
- ClearLag
- ItemsAdder
- Orebfuscator
- Addons

Slimefun has a thriving addon ecosystem. Check out the Addons Wiki Page (https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki/Addons) for a list of community addons, or create your own using the Developer Guide (https://github.com/Slimefun5/Slimefun5/wiki/Developer-Guide).
